    lang/mono6.8: Fix build with ninja

    Downgraded USES=autoreconf:2.69 to reduce the amount of warnings.
    There is no need to invoke autogen.sh after running autoreconf.

    PR:             272986
    Reported by:    saper@saper.info (maintainer)
